error_signature: Access token has expired, resubmit with a new access token
title: Power BI OAuth2 token expiration issue
symptom: After the initial connection, the workflow fails with a 403 error indicating that the access token has expired and needs to be refreshed.
root_cause: The OAuth2 token used for authentication has a limited lifespan. Once it expires, the workflow cannot automatically refresh it unless configured to do so, leading to access issues.
fix_steps: Set up a mechanism to refresh the token using a generic HTTP request.
Use the appropriate grant type and parameters to obtain a new access token.
Update the workflow with the new access token.
agent_instruction: Implement a token refresh mechanism using a generic HTTP request to obtain a new access token when the current one expires.
